name: smart_zone.live_coordinate_label_proof_v0
description: Smart Zone Manager live coordinate-label proof: open real Zone Manager UI, create Basecamp storage, accept Smart Zone generation, close/reopen, and audit generated row coordinate labels.

steps.label: gameplay_loaded_screen_gate
steps.expected_visible_fact: normal gameplay is loaded before Zone Manager input

steps.label: open_zones_manager
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is visibly open through profile-local F1 binding for DEFAULTMODE zones
steps.abort_reason: Zone Manager title text missing after open-zones key; stop before generation keys.

steps.label: add_zone
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager add-zone/type picker is open through profile-local F2 binding; Basecamp storage appears in the sorted list
steps.abort_reason: ADD_ZONE did not produce the visible zone type picker.

steps.label: navigate_to_basecamp_storage_zone_type
steps.expected_visible_fact: Basecamp: Storage is selected in the real zone type picker before confirmation
steps.abort_reason: Home + Down x5 did not leave the picker on Basecamp: Storage / inventory description.

steps.label: confirm_basecamp_storage_zone_type
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone name prompt is reached for Basecamp: Storage; default name will be accepted next.

steps.label: accept_default_storage_zone_name
steps.expected_visible_fact: Default Basecamp: Storage name accepted; placement look-around UI begins.

steps.label: pick_zone_start
steps.expected_visible_fact: First zone corner is selected through real look-around placement; screenshot archived, next guard is Smart Zone prompt after second corner.
steps.abort_reason: After selecting the first corner, the UI did not advance to Select second point.

steps.label: confirm_zone_end
steps.expected_visible_fact: Second zone corner accepted and Smart Zone Manager confirmation prompt is visible before pressing Yes
steps.abort_reason: After confirming the second corner, the Smart Zone Manager prompt was not visible.

steps.label: accept_smart_zone_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: After Yes, generated Smart Zone rows are visible in the real Zone Manager list.

steps.label: placed_layout_debug_trace
steps.expected_immediate_state: debug log contains accepted prompt and successful generated-zone result from this probe's log delta

steps.label: reopen_zones_manager_for_layout_inspection
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is visibly open after saving/reopening, with generated Smart Zone rows visible.

steps.label: zone_manager_row_trace_audit
steps.expected_immediate_state: debug log contains Zone Manager row trace entries with relative coordinate labels for generated Smart Zones
